DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS DENIED. THE COURT DOES NOT CONSIDER THE MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER TO HAVE BEEN BROUGHT PROMPTLY SINCE IT WAS BROUGHT AFTER RESPONSES WERE DUE AND WERE SERVED. THE COURT CONSIDERS A MOTION TO COMPEL WHERE A SEPARATE STATEMENT IS REQUIRED AS THE PROPER MOTION FOR LITIGATING WHETHER RESPONSES THAT HAVE ALREADY BEEN SERVED WERE SATISFACTORY. SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE HIGHMAN, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT TERRASOUL SUPERFOODS, LLC'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Production Of Documents is granted in part. The court adopts in full the recommendations and reasons for those recommendations in the report of Judge Pro Tem Bruce Highman. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made by the parties.

PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY'S Motion For Protective Order And For Monetary Sanctions.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY'S Motion For Protective Order And For Monetary Sanctions is denied. The court does not consider the motion for protective order to have been brought promptly since it was brought after responses were due and were served. The court considers a motion to compel where a separate statement is required as the proper motion for litigating whether responses that have already been served were satisfactory. Sanctions are denied. Prevailing party shall submit a proposed order to the court that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order And For Monetary Sanctions; Proof Of Service

This motion was filed August 3, 2017, but the moving party filed an identical motion on August 7, 2017 setting a hearing date of August 29, 2017. Also, no courtesy copies were lodged with court.
